Log:
  Add net-im/zkgroup

  zkgroup is a library for the Signal Private Group System.

  It is a new dependency for net-im/signal-cli.

  WWW: https://github.com/signalapp/zkgroup

  PR:		252041
  Submitted by:	jrm@ (earlier version)
